title: App disappeared from client's boards after pushing a new version to live!
excerpt: I was developing an app for a client and this morning at a meeting we had I pushed a new version to live and the app disappeared from client’s board. The automations are still trigerring but not showing up in the automat…

posts.author: willsamadi (Will Samadi)
posts.cookedHtml:
I was developing an app for a client and this morning at a meeting we had I pushed a new version to live and the app disappeared from client’s board. The automations are still trigerring but not showing up in the automations of the board!!!

When do you think this will get fixed? What can I do about it?? I don’t want to uninstall and install the app again since I would have to configure all the automations again…

The dev team at monday really really need to stop pushing buggy code to production…

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml: Did your new version contain any changes to permissions, scopes, etc.?

posts.author: willsamadi (Will Samadi)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am not changing anything about the app. I create a new version, push to live and the app disappears from all the accounts that have installed it for a couple of hours!!!

Happened last time 4 days ago and it happened today as well.

The app even disappears on my own account but for way shorter. It’s like it’s taking some time to propagate the changes to installed versions (even though there are no changes). But during that time the last version is not there either. So the app stops existing during the time that the new version is propagating.

Do you have a separate team working on the developer console? They need a warning honestly. This is not the only problem with the developer console. Every week something new breaks there. Is it in Beta stages?!

posts.author: willsamadi (Will Samadi)
posts.cookedHtml: It appears like this in run history. In automations it doesn’t exist. But when triggers occur the automation still runs.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @willsamadi

Would you be able to please fill this form adding as much information as possible to it (such as account ID, board IDs, item IDs, timestamps, etc.) so that our team can take a look into it?
